title: No more mistake with color
description: add abiliti to change colored block back to standar block
body:
**No more mistake with color**

Say goodbye to color mishaps with the **No More Mistakes with Color** data pack! This handy tool allows you to effortlessly revert dyed blocks  like stained glass, wool, terracotta  back to their original, undyed state. Whether you’re reworking a design or just want a fresh palette, this data pack makes sure that you never have to worry about wasted materials or time.

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_6d8ebecd-5a30-48c3-8140-a9f33855c6ea.png)**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_0f076192-d341-4199-8f92-54c32650a82c.png)**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_85cc7190-3079-43cf-860e-8f75133a235d.png)**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fb9960de-a32b-4ef1-aa84-d94cb79cb5a9.png)**

With **No More Mistakes with Color**, you can build with confidence, knowing that any color error is just a quick fix away!
